ddls:
CREATE TABLE "texts" (
  "text_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each text */,
  "text_content" TEXT /* The raw content of the text */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the source of the text */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the text was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the text was last updated */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the text */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata about the text */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the text (e.g., pending, processed, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("text_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_texts_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the source (e.g., speech, news article, social media) */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the source */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the source is active */,
  "last_fetched" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last data fetch from the source */,
  "fetch_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency at which data is fetched from the source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "preprocessed_texts" (
  "preprocessed_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preprocessed text */,
  "text_id" INTEGER /* ID of the original text */,
  "tokens" TEXT /* Tokenized version of the text */,
  "cleaned" TEXT /* Cleaned version of the text */,
  "stems" TEXT /* Stemmed version of the text */,
  "preprocessing_date" TEXT /* Date when the text was preprocessed */,
  "preprocessing_version" TEXT /* Version of the preprocessing algorithm used */,
  "preprocessing_status" TEXT /* Status of the preprocessing (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preprocessed_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_preprocessed_texts_text_id FOREIGN KEY ("text_id") REFERENCES texts ("text_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentiment_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentiment score */,
  "preprocessed_id" INTEGER /* ID of the preprocessed text */,
  "polarity" REAL /* Polarity score of the text (ranging from -1 to 1) */,
  "subjectivity" REAL /* Subjectivity score of the text (ranging from 0 to 1) */,
  "score_date" TEXT /* Date when the sentiment score was calculated */,
  "score_version" TEXT /* Version of the sentiment analysis algorithm used */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence level of the sentiment score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sentiment_scores_preprocessed_id FOREIGN KEY ("preprocessed_id") REFERENCES preprocessed_texts ("preprocessed_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, researcher, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "text_id" INTEGER /* ID of the text being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the text */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the text was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the text */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user accessing the text */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID of the user session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_text_id FOREIGN KEY ("text_id") REFERENCES texts ("text_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "text_id" INTEGER /* ID of the text being annotated */,
  "annotation_type" TEXT /* Type of the annotation (e.g., topic, entity) */,
  "annotation_value" TEXT /* Value of the annotation */,
  "annotated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who annotated the text */,
  "annotation_date" TEXT /* Date when the annotation was created */,
  "is_confirmed" INTEGER /* Indicates if the annotation has been confirmed by a reviewer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_text_id FOREIGN KEY ("text_id") REFERENCES texts ("text_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_annotated_by FOREIGN KEY ("annotated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic */,
  "topic_name" TEXT /* Name of the topic */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the topic */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the topic is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the topic was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the topic was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "entities" (
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entity */,
  "entity_name" TEXT /* Name of the entity */,
  "entity_type" TEXT /* Type of the entity (e.g., person, organization) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the entity is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the entity was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the entity was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "text_topics" (
  "text_topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each text-topic relationship */,
  "text_id" INTEGER /* ID of the text */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the topic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("text_topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_text_topics_text_id FOREIGN KEY ("text_id") REFERENCES texts ("text_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_text_topics_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("topic_id") REFERENCES topics ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "text_entities" (
  "text_entity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each text-entity relationship */,
  "text_id" INTEGER /* ID of the text */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("text_entity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_text_entities_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES entities ("entity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_text_entities_text_id FOREIGN KEY ("text_id") REFERENCES texts ("text_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "text_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each text version */,
  "text_id" INTEGER /* ID of the original text */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_content" TEXT /* Content of the text in this version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "version_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the text version (e.g., draft, published) */,
  "version_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the version update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_text_versions_text_id FOREIGN KEY ("text_id") REFERENCES texts ("text_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_text_versions_version_by FOREIGN KEY ("version_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
